title: jasminum sarawacense
intro: Jasminum sarawacense, also known as Sarawak jasmine or slipper jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant is prized for its fragrant, star-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Jasminum sarawacense include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Jasminum sarawacense are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
